# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.

Prevent insecure file upload vulnerabilities.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/**
 * Plugin Name: User File Upload
 * Description: Allows users to upload profile pictures and documents.
 * Version: 1.0
 * Author: Your Name
 */

function uf_upload_form() {
    if (is_user_logged_in()) {
        ?>
        <form action="" method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data">
            <label for="profile_picture">Profile Picture (jpg, jpeg, png):</label>
            <input type="file" name="profile_picture" id="profile_picture" accept=".jpg, .jpeg, .png" required>
            <br>
            <label for="document">Document (pdf, doc, docx):</label>
            <input type="file" name="document" id="document" accept=".pdf, .doc, .docx" required>
            <br>
            <input type="submit" name="uf_upload" value="Upload">
        </form>
        <?php
    } else {
        echo 'You must be logged in to upload files.';
    }
}

add_shortcode('uf_upload_form', 'uf_upload_form');

function uf_handle_upload() {
    if (isset($_POST['uf_upload'])) {
        $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        $user_dir = $upload_dir['basedir'] . '/user-files/' . get_current_user_id();
        
        if (!file_exists($user_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($user_dir);
        }

        $allowed_image_types = array('image/jpeg', 'image/png');
        $allowed_document_types = array('application/pdf', 'application/msword', 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document');

        foreach ($_FILES as $file) {
            if ($file['error'] === UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
                $file_type = mime_content_type($file['tmp_name']);
                $file_name = basename($file['name']);
                $target_file = $user_dir . '/' . $file_name;

                if (in_array($file_type, $allowed_image_types) || in_array($file_type, $allowed_document_types)) {
                    if (move_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'], $target_file)) {
                        echo "File uploaded successfully: " . esc_html($file_name);
                    } else {
                        echo "Error uploading file.";
                    }
                } else {
                    echo "Invalid file type.";
                }
            } else {
                echo "Error with file upload.";
            }
        }
    }
}

add_action('init', 'uf_handle_upload');
?>
